q: Which article of the Indian Constitution is known as the 'Heart and Soul' of the Constitution?
e: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar called Article 32 (Right to Constitutional Remedies) the heart and soul of the Constitution.

q: Who was the leader of the 1857 revolt in Bihar?
e: Babu Kunwar Singh led the Indian Rebellion of 1857 in Bihar at the age of 80.
